steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The question asks for a similarity between Untitled (Two Heads on Gold) and Jazz. The notes show that both works use acrylic paint, even though their dates, sizes, and other materials differ. The choice should state the common medium directly, not merely place the works in sequence.

steps.title: Reject contrasts and chronology
steps.content: Choice A gives completion dates, not a similarity. Choice B emphasizes that one work is larger. Choice D lists different material combinations and uses contrast rather than highlighting the shared acrylic medium. The answer is C.
